python--python-data-functions--draft.title: Python Data and Functions
python--python-data-functions--draft.description: Build practical Python skills with lists, tuples, dictionaries, functions, helper modules, files, exceptions, and simple data cleaning.
python--python-data-functions--draft.moreComingSoon: More Python Data and Functions lessons are coming soon.

python-5-lists-tuples-and-dictionaries.title: Lists, Tuples, and Dictionaries
python-5-lists-tuples-and-dictionaries.description: Teach learners how to organize multiple values and choose the right collection type.
outcomes: Use tuples for fixed grouped values
why: Builds confidence with lists, tuples, and dictionaries.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

python-6-functions-and-modularity.title: Functions and Modularity
python-6-functions-and-modularity.description: Help learners organize code into reusable functions, helper modules, and simple imports with clear inputs and outputs.
outcomes: Separate program logic into small pieces
Use simple imports and helper modules
why: Builds confidence with functions and modularity.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

python-7-files-exceptions-and-data-clean.title: Files, Exceptions, and Data Cleaning
python-7-files-exceptions-and-data-clean.description: Teach learners how to read files, create/write files, import standard-library data tools, and handle messy data without crashing programs.
why: Builds confidence with files, exceptions, and data cleaning.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

python-8-real-world-project.title: Real-World Project
python-8-real-world-project.description: Guide learners through a longer beginner data-cleaning project that combines lists, dictionaries, helper functions, files, and summaries.
outcomes: Read and clean a structured file line by line
Refactor cleaning and summary logic into helper functions
Write final output files and summaries from one complete workflow
why: Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.title: List Basics
python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.description: Learn creating and indexing lists, list methods and mutation, looping through lists through focused examples and practice.

python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.title: Dictionaries
python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.description: Learn dictionary basics, updating and looping dictionaries, nested data structures through focused examples and practice.

python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.title: Module Project
python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.description: Learn module 5 gradebook project through focused examples and practice.

python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.title: Function Basics
python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.description: Learn defining and calling functions, parameters and return values, print vs return through focused examples and practice.

python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.title: Function Design
python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.description: Learn scope and local variables, decomposition and refactoring, using imports and helper files through focused examples and practice.

python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.title: Module Project
python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.description: Learn module 6 name badge package through focused examples and practice.

python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.title: File Input and Output
python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.description: Learn reading text files, writing text files, working with paths through focused examples and practice.

python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.title: Exceptions and Cleaning
python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.description: Learn try/except basics, validating and cleaning input, simple csv processing through focused examples and practice.

python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.title: Module Project
python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.description: Learn module 7 clean student records project through focused examples and practice.

python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.title: Final Project
python--python-data-functions--draft-pyt.description: Learn class roster cleaner through focused examples and practice.
